hero.name: Semi Fernandez
hero.tagline: I build production systems across blockchain, frontend, and backend — and the infrastructure that keeps them running.

blockchain.title: Blockchain
blockchain.summary: EVM · Solana · TON. Multichain infrastructure, wallet integrations, gasless flows, and non-custodial payment systems. Built systems handling $1M/day in transaction volume.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.summary: React · Next.js · TypeScript. I translate complex transaction flows into fast, intuitive interfaces. 80s → 5s load time fix. −50% onboarding churn.

backend.title: Backend
backend.summary: Node.js · AWS (Fargate, SQS, Lambda, Aurora, DynamoDB, Redis). APIs adopted by 100+ integrating teams. End-to-end ownership from architecture to incident response.

other.title: Other
other.summary: Teaching at uDevHouse. Smart-contract security reviews. Electronics engineering background. Founder and CTO of two companies.

payments.title: Multichain Payment Infrastructure
payments.desc: Non-custodial payment system across EVM and Solana. Handles up to $1M/day in transaction volume with gasless flows, wallet integrations, and full monitoring coverage.

platform.title: Developer Platform & API
platform.desc: Multi-team API platform and developer tooling adopted by 100+ integrating teams. Full ownership from system design through incident response and on-call.

onboarding.title: Global Onboarding System
onboarding.desc: Rebuilt transaction and onboarding flows across 53 countries. Cut page load from ~80s to 5s and reduced onboarding churn by 50%.

about.title: About
about.bio_p1: Senior software engineer with 8+ years building production systems across frontend, backend, and blockchain infrastructure. My work has focused on multichain products, payment flows, developer platforms, and wallet-adjacent experiences across EVM, Solana, and other ecosystems.
about.bio_p2: I bring strong end-to-end ownership, practical product sense, and a bias toward building systems that are both technically sound and usable in the real world.
about.exp_vudy_desc: Built product architecture from scratch, owned observability on a live system processing $1M/day, and shipped gasless payment flows across 8+ EVM networks.
about.exp_u3tech_desc: Web3 payment infrastructure for LATAM businesses. Multichain dApp frontends and backend systems serving users across 53 countries.
about.exp_udevhouse_desc: Engineering education platform for production-grade full-stack and Web3 development. Mentored engineers across frontend, dApp, and smart contract domains.
about.exp_freelance_desc: Shipped features across 10+ production projects — React dApps, wallet integrations, event-driven pipelines, and smart contract security reviews across EVM, Solana, and TON.
about.exp_anywhere_desc: Rebuilt core platform workflows and dashboards used across multiple countries, modernizing the frontend with a focus on usability for non-technical stakeholders.
about.earlier_intro: Before full-time engineering I repaired avionics electronics, designed wireless networks for commercial buildings, helped run a tourism company, and spent two years making coffee.
about.exp_avionics_desc: Electronic component repair and maintenance for aviation equipment.
about.exp_audio_desc: Designed and installed enterprise wireless networks for Torre Barcelona and the Condado Naranjo offices in Guatemala City. Multiple private home audio and network installations. Unifi certified.
about.exp_autoshop_desc: Hands-on technical work in an automotive environment.
about.exp_tourism_desc: Family-owned tourism company. Built reports, analyzed data, and supported business decisions.

transparency.label: Transparency
transparency.body: I share real numbers, real tradeoffs, and real limitations. No inflated claims.

directness.label: Directness
directness.body: I say what I mean. Clear scope, honest timelines, no fluff in communication.

equality.label: Equality
equality.body: I've built for 53 countries, mentored engineers across LATAM, and I believe good software should work for everyone.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.body: I build non-custodial systems and avoid unnecessary data collection — in my products and in my own site.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.body: Open to new projects, collaborations, and conversations.

footer.built_with: Built with Next.js 16 · Tailwind v4 · Deployed on Vercel
